title: stachys langmaniae
intro: Stachys langmaniae, also known as Langmania's betony, is a flowering plant species native to China. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Stachys langmaniae include reducing inflammation, alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or used in herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
